title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.136 - Municipal courts, utilization of collection agencies permitted, when
text:
67.136.  Municipal courts, utilization of collection agencies permitted, when. — Notwithstanding any other provisions of law to the contrary, any city or county that has established a municipal court may utilize collections agencies to collect any court or administrative fines or costs associated with a finding of guilt for a criminal offense or an infraction, or entry of a civil judgment, which are legally owed, enforceable, past due, and remain uncollected.
(L. 2012 S.B. 628)
